profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper
service.tagline: Search LinkedIn jobs by title and location through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper exposes an Apify-backed LinkedIn job search workflow through the marketplace for labor market research, job monitoring, and competitive hiring analysis.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the LinkedIn Jobs Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide a job title, location, and the number of rows you want returned.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Search Jobs
endpoints.description: Search LinkedIn jobs by title and location and return job listing results.
endpoints.usageNotes: Use this for direct LinkedIn job discovery when the unit of search is a title and place rather than a company page or external job board.
